top_signals.title: Mitch McConnell's health concerns grow amid 4th week in hospital with few details from aides
top_signals.summary: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to the hospital on June 14.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
